name: Plaid Bow Basket Blue - Threshold™
description:
Add an appealing storage solution to your home with this Plaid Bow Basket from Threshold™. This decorative basket is made of felt in a white hue accented with a red plaid bow for a simple yet chic look you'll love to have on display. The rectangular basket features an open top to make it easy to stash away and store other items, and it's easy to move around your home.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
